# Feature: Voicebox TTS timeout + cold-start reliability

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-13 -->

## Intent

Users hit „Voicebox TTS Zeitüberschreitung — bitte erneut versuchen.“ during voice design and preview, especially when the Qwen model is not yet in RAM. Extend generation patience, retry once on timeout, clearer German progress/errors, and speed up multi-candidate previews after warm-up.

## Preconditions

- Desktop (`npm run dev:desktop`) + `.scriptony` project open
- Voicebox reachable at `http://127.0.0.1:17493` (may show `model_loaded: false` on cold start)

## Happy Path

- [ ] First TTS after cold start may take several minutes; Scriptony waits up to 5 minutes per generation (not 2)
- [ ] During long synthesis, progress message reflects model loading / still generating (German)
- [ ] On transient timeout, Scriptony retries the generation once automatically
- [ ] Voice design: candidate A synthesizes first (warm-up); B/C synthesize in parallel when A succeeds
- [ ] Successful TTS still marks model warm (`markVoiceboxTtsSucceeded`)

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Second retry failure shows actionable German message (model still loading vs try again)
- [ ] Candidate synthesis errors stay per-row; siblings still complete
- [ ] `model_loaded: true` uses same extended timeout (no regression on slow GPU)

## Regression

- [ ] Normal single `generateVoiceboxSpeech` (timeline TTS) still works
- [ ] `npm run verify -- --frontend` passes

## Assumptions

- Voicebox `/history` remains the completion signal; no new Voicebox API required
- Parallel B/C after A is acceptable on typical Apple Silicon RAM (2 concurrent, not 3)

## Implementation Notes

- `src/lib/voicebox/voicebox-tts-generation.ts` — 300s timeout, progress/timeout copy, `VoiceboxGenerationTimeoutError`
- `src/lib/api/voicebox-api.ts` — uses extended timeout, elapsed progress, 1 automatic retry on timeout, cold-start message from `/health`
- `src/lib/mve/casting/synthesize-voice-design-candidate-previews.ts` — candidate A first (warm-up), B/C in parallel
- Tests: `voicebox-tts-generation.test.ts`; existing synthesis tests pass
- `npm run verify -- --frontend` — PASS

## Related

- Qwen warm-up on modal open: `.qa/acceptance/voicebox-qwen-tts-warmup.md`
